scope.target: Skill-family taxonomy, rename horizon, and compatibility workflow map
constraints: Do not rename skills during planning
Group development skills before considering aesthetic renames

steps: Inventory canonical skills and lifecycle roles
Measure active and historical repo-structure-sync references
Check current schema support for aliases and deprecation
Place additive taxonomy and compatibility transition in v0.6.0
Make v0.7.0 retirement conditional on downstream evidence
validation: Direct 87-tracked-file plus one local-input rename-impact inventory
execution.last_completed_step: Defined AI-context and development lifecycle families with a two-release identifier transition.
execution.next_action: After v0.5.0 stabilizes governance, design alias metadata and activate the v0.6.0 taxonomy workflow.

results.summary: Use v0.6.0 for additive family taxonomy and the ai-context-init compatibility transition. Use v0.7.0 only for evidence-backed retirement of repo-structure-sync or other justified breaking renames.
results.residual_risk: Runtime alias behavior is not yet a canonical schema capability and must be designed before the rename.
